title: sphaeralcea coccinea var. elata
intro: Sphaeralcea coccinea var. elata, also known as the tall red gilia, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Sphaeralcea coccinea var. elata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
